title: 16S rRNA Library Prep for Nanopore MinION
author: Somasundhari Shanmuganandam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6j6hcre

steps.title: 1 For a 100 µl PCR...
steps.instruction: 1 For a 100 µl PCR reaction, use the following setup %s %s ReagentsVolume (µl) for 25µl reactionTemplate DNA5µl ( 2.3ng)Water, nuclease-free15Q5 high fidelity PCR Master Mix 25µL10 µM forward primer2.5µL10 µM reverse primer2.5µL

steps.title: The PCR conditions are
steps.instruction: The PCR conditions are: initial denaturation at 98°C for 30 sec 28 cycles of 98°C for 10 sec 55°C for 15 sec 72°C for 40 sec with final extension at 72°C for 5 min

steps.title: Add 1 volume (100ul) of resuspended...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume (100ul) of resuspended beads into each PCR reactions and mix by flicking the tubes

steps.title: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator mixer) for 5 minutes at room temperature

steps.title: Prepare 20 ml of fresh 70% ethanol in nuclease-free water
steps.instruction: Prepare 20 ml of fresh 70% ethanol in nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Spin down the sample and pellet on a magnet
steps.instruction: Spin down the sample and pellet on a magnet. Keep the tube on the 96 well magnet rack, and pipette off the supernatant.

steps.title: Keep on magnet, wash beads with...
steps.instruction: Keep on magnet, wash beads with 200 µl of freshly prepared 70% ethanol without disturbing the pellet using the multichannel pipette and 70% ethanol in a trough. Remove the 70% ethanol using a pipette and discard. Repeat.

steps.title: Spin down and place the tube back on the magnet
steps.instruction: Spin down and place the tube back on the magnet. Pipette off any residual ethanol. Briefly allow to dry for 3 -5 mins

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend pellet in 15 µl nuclease-free water. Incubate for 2 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Pellet beads on magnet until the...
steps.instruction: Pellet beads on magnet until the eluate is clear and colourless.

steps.title: Run 3 µl of the cleaned...
steps.instruction: Run 3 µl of the cleaned up DNA product in 1% agarose gel to ensure the cleaned product is free from primers.

steps.title: Run 1 µl of DNA in...
steps.instruction: Run 1 µl of DNA in qubit using high sensitivity assay kit and 1 µl in nanodrop to ensure the cleaned up DNA is free from contamination from RNA and/or protein.

steps.title: Based on the qubit reading, take...
steps.instruction: Based on the qubit reading, take 500 ng of cleaned up DNA in 25 µl of nuclease free water.

steps.title: Add the reagents below in the...
steps.instruction: Add the reagents below in the same order in a fresh 0.8 ml PCR strip tube %s %s 2

steps.title: Mix gently by flicking the tube, and spin down
steps.instruction: Mix gently by flicking the tube, and spin down

steps.title: Incubate for 10 minutes at 20...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 minutes at 20 °C and 30 minutes at 65 °C using the thermal cycler with a lid temperature of 70°C.

steps.title: Add 1 volume (30 µl) of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume (30 µl) of resuspended AMPure XP beads to the end-prep reaction and mix by flicking the tube.

steps.title: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator mixer) for 5 minutes at room temperature

steps.title: Spin down the sample and pellet...
steps.instruction: Spin down the sample and pellet on a 96 well magnet rack. Keep the tube on the magnet, and pipette off the supernatant individually

steps.title: Keep on magnet, wash beads with...
steps.instruction: Keep on magnet, wash beads with 200 µl of freshly prepared 70% ethanol without disturbing the pellet using the multichannel pipette and 70% ethanol in a trough. Remove the 70% ethanol using a pipette and discard. Repeat.

steps.title: Spin down and place the tube back on the magnet
steps.instruction: Spin down and place the tube back on the magnet. Pipette off any residual ethanol. Briefly allow to dry for 3 -5 mins at room temperature.

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend pellet in 15 µl nuclease-free water by flicking the tubes. Incubate for 2 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Pellet beads on magnet until the...
steps.instruction: Pellet beads on magnet until the eluate is clear and colourless.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µl of end-prepped DNA...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µl of end-prepped DNA using Qubit high sensitivity assay kit

steps.title: For next stage, we need 80...
steps.instruction: For next stage, we need 80 ng per sample and hence, dilute the sample concentration to 80 ng to make a final volume of 9 µl in a new strip tube

steps.title: Adding the following reagents in the...
steps.instruction: Adding the following reagents in the same order as below %s %s

steps.title: Mix gently by flicking the tube, and spin down
steps.instruction: Mix gently by flicking the tube, and spin down

steps.title: Incubate the reaction for 10 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction for 10 minutes at room temperature

steps.title: Incubate the reaction for 10 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction for 10 minutes at room temperature. Add 20 µl of resuspended AMPure XP beads to the reaction and mix by flicking the tube.

steps.title: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator mixer) for 5 minutes at room temperature

steps.title: Spin down the sample and pellet on a magnet
steps.instruction: Spin down the sample and pellet on a magnet. Keep the tube on the magnet, and pipette off the supernatant.

steps.title: Keep on magnet, wash beads with...
steps.instruction: Keep on magnet, wash beads with 200 µl of freshly prepared 70% ethanol without disturbing the pellet using the multichannel pipette and 70% ethanol in a trough. Remove the 70% ethanol using a pipette and discard. Repeat.

steps.title: Spin down and place the tube back on the magnet
steps.instruction: Spin down and place the tube back on the magnet. Pipette off any residual ethanol. Briefly allow to dry for 3 - 5 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend pellet in 12 µl nuclease-free water. Incubate for 2 minutes at room temperature

steps.title: Pellet beads on magnet until the...
steps.instruction: Pellet beads on magnet until the eluate is clear and colourless.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µl of barcoded DNA...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µl of barcoded DNA in Qubit high sensitivity assay.

steps.title: Based on the qubit reading, add 36
steps.instruction: Based on the qubit reading, add 36.4 ng of each barcoded sample in a 1.5 ml eppendorf tube to get a final concentration of more than 400 ng. If the volume exceeds 50 µl, perform 2.5 x volume AMPure XP bead cleanup with final elution volume of 52 µl of nuclease free water.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µl of barcoded DNA...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µl of barcoded DNA in Qubit high sensitivity assay to concentration is greater than 400 ng.

steps.title: Thaw the reagents in ice
steps.instruction: Thaw the reagents in ice

steps.title: Add the reagents in following order...
steps.instruction: Add the reagents in following order and flick between addition of each reagents %s %s aeR

steps.title: Incubate the reaction for 10 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Prepare the AMPure XP beads for use; resuspend by vortexing
steps.instruction: Prepare the AMPure XP beads for use; resuspend by vortexing. Prepare another 1ml of fresh 70% Ethanol. Prepare all the tubes and megnetic rack ready.

steps.title: Add 40 µl of resuspended AMPure...
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl of resuspended AMPure XP beads to the adapter ligation reaction from the previous step and mix by flicking.

steps.title: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a Hula mixer (rotator mixer) for 5 minutes at room temperature. Take out the flowcell from the fridge to let it recover to room temperature.

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack, allow beads...
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack, allow beads to pellet and pipette off supernatant.

steps.title: Add 140 μl of the Adapter...
steps.instruction: Add 140 μl of the Adapter Bead Binding buffer to the beads. Close the tube lid, and resuspend the beads by flicking the tube. Return the tube to the magnetic rack, allow beads to pellet and pipette off the supernatant. Repeat.

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend pellet in 15 µl Elution Buffer by flicking. Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Pellet beads on magnet until the...
steps.instruction: Pellet beads on magnet until the eluate is clear and colourless, Remove and retain 15 µl of eluate into a clean 1.5 ml Eppendorf DNA LoBind tube. Store on ice.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µl of adapter ligated...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µl of adapter ligated DNA in Qubit high sensitivity assay to ensure concentration is close to 200 ng

steps.title: prepare the priming mix as follows...
steps.instruction: prepare the priming mix as follows in a 2 ml Eppendorf tube: %s %s

steps.title: Take out the flowcell from the...
steps.instruction: Take out the flowcell from the box, flip back the MinION lid and slide the priming port cover clockwise so that the priming port is visible.

steps.title: After opening the priming port, check...
steps.instruction: After opening the priming port, check for small bubble under the cover. Draw back a small volume to remove any bubble (a few µls): Set a P1000 pipette to 200 µl; Insert the tip into the priming port; Turn the wheel until the dial shows 220-230 µl, or until you can see a small volume of buffer entering the pipette tip. Visually check that there is continuous buffer from the priming port across the sensor array.

steps.title: Load 800 µl of the priming...
steps.instruction: Load 800 µl of the priming mix into the flow cell via the priming port, avoiding the introduction of air bubbles. Wait for 5 minutes. Pipette ~830 ul of the priming mix, before putting the tip on the priming port, slightly drop a little of the liquid to cover the port and attach the tip to the port. Slowly pipette the priming mix out but DO NOT pipette out everything. Remaining the last few (~20ul) of priming mix in the tip and take off the tip straightway. This is to make sure no air goes into the port.

steps.title: Thoroughly mix the contents of the...
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix the contents of the RBF and LLB tubes by pipetting, Prepare the library for loading as follows: %s %s

steps.title: Complete the flow cell priming
steps.instruction: Complete the flow cell priming: 1.Gently lift the SpotON sample port cover to make the SpotON sample port accessible. 2. Load 200 µl of the priming mix into the flow cell via the priming port (not the SpotON sample port), avoiding the introduction of air bubbles. The same idea, pipette ~230ul of the priming mix and be careful as the previous priming step.

steps.title: Mix the prepared library gently by...
steps.instruction: Mix the prepared library gently by pipetting up and down just prior to loading.

steps.title: Add 75 μl of sample to...
steps.instruction: Add 75 μl of sample to the flow cell via the SpotON sample port in a dropwise fashion. Ensure each drop flows into the port before adding the next.

steps.title: After the last drop was absorbed,...
steps.instruction: After the last drop was absorbed, quickly replace the SpotON sample port cover, making sure the bung enters the SpotON port, close the priming port and replace the MinION lid.

steps.title: Run the MinION sequencer
steps.instruction: Run the MinION sequencer
